indications: Heart failure with reduced ejection fraction
Excessive daytime sleepiness in narcolepsy or OSA
Seizures in Lennox-Gastaut, Dravet, or tuberous sclerosis
Pruritus due to progressive familial intrahepatic cholestasis
Influenza A and B treatment and prophylaxis
Influenza A and B treatment and prophylaxis
CMV infection refractory to other therapies
Moderate to moderately severe acute pain
Spasticity from MS or spinal cord injury
